channel.title: Frontion News - Global Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: Russia launches massive strikes across Ukraine killing at least nine
item.description: Ballistic missiles and drones hit Kyiv and Dnipro, destroying apartment buildings. Moscow warned of systematic strikes after a drone attack in Luhansk killed 21.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: Hezbollah agrees to halt attacks on Israel in US-brokered deal
item.description: Lebanon confirmed Hezbollah accepted a mutual cessation of attacks, but Israel said it would continue operations in southern Lebanon. Iran warned violations would breach the US-Iran ceasefire.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: Pope Leo XIV makes historic apology for Vatican role in slavery
item.description: First US-born pope issued encyclical acknowledging papal bulls that legitimized slavery for centuries. Called it a wound in Christian memory.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: Bond market sends inflation warning to Trump ahead of midterms
item.description: Rising Treasury yields driven by deficit concerns and Iran war costs are pushing mortgage rates to 9-month highs, creating economic vulnerability for Republicans.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: Trump berates Netanyahu over Lebanon strikes in heated call
item.description: US president reportedly told Israeli PM everyone hates Israel over its bombardment of Lebanon. Hezbollah agreed to halt attacks after the call.
item.dc:creator: The Independent

item.title: Goldman Sachs Warns Fuel Margins to Stay Elevated Through 2026
item.description: Hormuz disruptions continue to squeeze refined product markets as shipping remains constrained.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Norway Oil Workers Threaten Strike from June 5
item.description: Labor dispute could affect North Sea production amid already tight global supplies.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Kakao Union Announces June 10 Strike Over Job Security
item.description: South Korean tech giant faces labor action as workers demand protections.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Massive Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv kills 6, injures 55
item.description: Intelligence warnings proved accurate as Russia launched coordinated strikes on multiple cities.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: Hegseth vows Supreme Court appeal after transgender military ban ruling
item.description: Appeals court struck down Trump policy; administration plans further legal challenge.
item.dc:creator: The Hill

item.title: Two dead in Taiwan military training plane crash at Kaohsiung air base
item.description: Training aircraft crashed during routine exercise at southern Taiwan base.
item.dc:creator: Straits Times

item.title: French Navy Intercepts Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker in Atlantic
item.description: Macron confirms boarding of vessel suspected of sanctions evasion.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: UN Security Council Demands Israeli Withdrawal From Southern Lebanon
item.description: Resolution passed as Israel continues ground operations despite ceasefire calls.
item.dc:creator: New York Times

item.title: Russian Airstrikes Kill Five in Major Attack Across Ukraine
item.description: Witnesses report widespread destruction as missiles target multiple cities.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Zelenskiy Aide Sees Realistic Chance of Peace Deal by Winter
item.description: Senior Ukrainian official expresses optimism about negotiations timeline.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Taiwan Opposition Leader Seeks Trump Meeting on US Visit
item.description: KMT chairman travels to Washington amid debate over defense spending cuts.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Appeals Court Rules Trump Policy Illegally Banned Transgender Troops
item.description: Court upholds lower court ruling finding military ban unconstitutional.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: Hungarian PM Threatens to Remove Orbán-Era President
item.description: Political tensions escalate as governing party moves against president appointed by previous administration.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: Russia loses more territory than it gained in May for first time since 2023
item.description: DeepState analysis shows net territorial loss for Russian forces in May.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: Oil prices fall as Middle East tensions ease after Trump remarks
item.description: Brent crude retreats from highs on ceasefire optimism.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: Taiwan KMT leader heads to US amid scrutiny of defense cuts
item.description: Opposition party faces questions over proposed reductions to military spending.
item.dc:creator: Nikkei Asia

item.title: US Gasoline Market Faces Fresh Test After Near-Record Inventory Drawdowns
item.description: Strategic reserve releases fail to offset Hormuz supply disruption.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Putin Hosts Fifth Wartime Economic Conference as Russia Struggles for Growth Strategy
item.description: Economic forum seeks solutions as war economy strains Russian growth potential.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: US to Drastically Slash African Embassy Visa Processing
item.description: Policy change reduces visa services across African nations, citing resource constraints.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: South Korea Surpasses India as Worlds Sixth-Largest Stock Market
item.description: KOSPI rally driven by semiconductor and defense stocks pushes market cap past India.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg
